text: 課題７：<yellow>タリスの武器アクションで３回高速移動を行う

Training 7: Use the Talis Weapon Action to perform high-speed
movement three times

-Press and hold <%PhotonArts> to charge up your
Weapon Action
-Fire off a Marking Shot
